title: Desaturation MC
description: A Resource Pack that removes all saturation from nearly all blocks and entities!
body:
This Resource Pack desaturates all blocks, items, and entities as much as possible. I wanted to release this as a standalone in case anyone wanted to edit it, or work off it for any other packs. Or even just play it in a completely vanilla environment. **Some items are not desaturated due to my limited understanding of overlays in the resource pack system.** This can be "corrected" by applying this shader pack: [https://modrinth.com/shader/colorsplash](https://modrinth.com/shader/colorsplash) Alternatively, I have a small modpack that packages all this together and creates a fully desaturated Minecraft experience right out of the box: [https://modrinth.com/modpack/nearly-enough-desaturation](https://modrinth.com/modpack/nearly-enough-desaturation)
Blocks/Items Not Desaturated
  • Players
  • Banners
  • Some Leaf Blocks (Seems to be dependant on tree type + biome combo
  • Lily Pads
  • Vines (Again, only in some biomes or on some trees)
  • Leather Armor (Including Horse)
  • Tipped Arrows
  • Potions
  • Spawn Eggs
  • Water
  • Skybox
**Check out all my other projects on Modrinth!** **https://modrinth.com/user/Heartstrings**
